message:
feat(dashboard): add files panel and CASS context panel to sidebar

This commit adds two new sidebar panels to the TUI dashboard for improved
situational awareness during multi-agent sessions.

Files Panel Integration (dashboard.go):
- Added filesPanel field to Model struct
- Initialized NewFilesPanel() in New() constructor
- Connected file change data to panel via SetData() in FileChangeMsg handler
- Renders in sidebar with height-gating (minimum height check)
- Maximum height capped at 14 lines to leave room for other panels
- Shows file modifications attributed to specific agents

CASS Context Panel (panels/cass.go, cass_test.go):
- New CASSPanel type displays recent CASS search hits for current session
- Implements standard Panel interface with focus/blur, resize, scroll
- Shows session titles, relevance scores, and relative timestamps
- Supports keyboard navigation (j/k, up/down, g/G for top/bottom)
- Height-gated rendering in sidebar (min 8 lines, max 14 lines)
- Graceful degradation when CASS is unavailable
- Full test coverage for rendering and hit display

Panel Configuration:
- Files panel: Priority normal, min height 6, min width 30, collapsible
- CASS panel: Priority normal, min height 8, min width 35, collapsible,
  15-minute refresh interval

Sidebar Rendering Updates:
- Both panels use consistent height calculation with spacer
- Focus state properly propagated to panels
- Panels render below scan badge when space permits

Layout Tests Added:
- TestSidebarRendersCASSContext: verifies CASS hits appear in sidebar
- TestSidebarRendersFileChanges: verifies file changes appear in sidebar

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
